captions.formal: This time-lapse video shows continuous traffic flow along a multi-lane, tree-lined urban roadway with yellow autumn foliage, captured from an elevated viewpoint with a city skyline and distant mountains in the background under a bright, hazy daytime sky.
captions.sarcastic: Wow, cars driving on a road lined with pretty yellow trees while a skyline just sits there looking scenic in the background, truly the pinnacle of edge-of-your-seat entertainment.
captions.humorous_tech: Traffic streams through the intersection like packets through a congested router, blurring past yellow-leaved trees while the skyline hums quietly in the background, no buffering required.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Everyone's rushing somewhere under those golden autumn trees, probably late for dinner or desperately trying to beat the next red light before the sun changes its mind about staying warm.

captions.formal: A small orange and white kitten walks steadily toward the camera across a dirt-covered, leaf-strewn forest floor, with dappled sunlight and hanging vines visible in the softly blurred background.
captions.sarcastic: Oh sure, just a tiny kitten casually strutting through the woods like it's the star of its own nature documentary, one deliberate paw-step at a time.
captions.humorous_tech: Kitten.exe is running a flawless forward-motion loop, front paw extended in every frame like it's rendering itself walking toward the camera in real time, no lag detected despite the leafy background blur.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Someone forgot to tell this fluffy orange and white kitten that the woods are supposed to be scary, because it's strutting through twigs and dappled sunlight like it owns the whole forest.

captions.formal: A woman with a curly bun hairstyle, wearing a beige jacket over an orange top, is shown typing at a keyboard in front of a large monitor in a modern glass-partitioned office as the camera slowly moves closer from the side.
captions.sarcastic: Wow, a woman typing at a desk with a corded mouse next to a plant—truly the most riveting office footage since the invention of the swivel chair.
captions.humorous_tech: She's typing with the intense focus of someone debugging production at 4:59pm on a Friday, while that poor corded mouse just lies there unemployed since she's clearly a keyboard-only warrior.
captions.humorous_non_tech: That's the universal face of someone typing an email they've rewritten four times, rocking a killer curly bun that's doing more work than some of her coworkers.
